description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG/JS, NO <canvas>) of a bar-chart SORT. Show 8 vertical SVG bars of distinct heights and equal width, evenly spaced along a shared baseline, each labeled with its value. Over ~4 seconds animate them smoothly reordering into ascending height (bars slide horizontally to swap positions, several swaps). Bars keep equal width and the shared baseline throughout; the final state is fully sorted ascending. A title sits at top.
requirements: There are exactly 8 equal-width bars sharing one baseline at every sampled frame
All bars stay fully within the 1920x1080 viewport at every frame (none clipped at an edge)
Bars never overlap each other during the swaps
The bars are visibly reordering over time (positions differ between early and late frames)
The final frame shows the bars sorted in ascending height order
Each bar keeps its value label attached and legible throughout
The bars remain evenly spaced (uniform gaps) at the start and end
No horizontal or vertical scrollbar appears at any frame
expected_issues: Bars overflow the viewport while swapping

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG/JS, NO <canvas>) of a 5-step horizontal progress stepper ('Cart -> Address -> Shipping -> Payment -> Done'). Five equal-width, equally-spaced circular step nodes sit on one horizontal line connected by segments. Over ~4s the steps activate left-to-right: each node fills with the accent color and its connector fills, one after another, with a checkmark appearing in completed nodes. All five nodes stay on one aligned row throughout.
requirements: Exactly 5 equal-size step nodes sit on one horizontal line, equally spaced, at every frame
All nodes, labels, and connectors stay fully within the viewport at every frame
The five nodes share the same vertical center (aligned row) throughout
Steps activate in left-to-right order over time (more nodes filled in later frames)
Connector segments fill between consecutive activated nodes
Completed nodes show a checkmark and the active node is visually distinct
Step labels stay attached to their nodes and do not overlap neighbors
No scrollbar appears at any frame
expected_issues: All steps fill at once (no sequencing)

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG, NO <canvas>) of THREE equal-size dashboard gauges in one aligned row (CPU, Memory, Disk). Each gauge is an SVG semicircular arc with a sweeping needle and a numeric readout that counts up to its target (72%, 45%, 88%) over ~3s. The three gauges share the same size, top edge, and baseline, with uniform gutters.
requirements: Exactly three equal-size gauges in one row, sharing top and bottom edges with uniform gutters, at every frame
All three gauges and their readouts stay fully within the viewport at every frame
Each needle sweeps from the start position toward its target over time (angle differs between early and late frames)
Each numeric readout counts up and ends at its target (72%, 45%, 88%)
Needles stay within their gauge arc (do not extend outside the gauge)
The three gauges do not overlap each other
Gauge labels (CPU, Memory, Disk) stay attached and legible
No scrollbar at any frame
expected_issues: Needle sweeps outside the arc / off-canvas

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG/JS, NO <canvas>) of a card carousel. Four equal-size content cards sit in a horizontal track; over ~4s the track slides so each card becomes centered in turn (card 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4), with the centered card slightly enlarged and the others dimmed. Pagination dots below indicate the active card. Cards stay equal-size and horizontally aligned; partially-visible neighbor cards are clipped only by an explicit rounded viewport mask, never by the screen edge unexpectedly.
requirements: Four equal-size cards share the same vertical center and height at every frame
Exactly one card is centered/enlarged at a time, and which card is centered changes over time (1->2->3->4)
The active pagination dot matches the centered card and there are exactly 4 dots
All on-screen content stays within the viewport (no card or dot clipped at the screen edge unexpectedly)
Cards do not overlap each other
The pagination dots sit in one aligned row, equally spaced
The non-centered cards are visibly dimmed relative to the centered one
No scrollbar at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/JS, NO <canvas>) of a terminal typewriter. A centered terminal window (with a title bar and 3 colored dots) types out, line by line over ~5s, a short multi-line shell session (at least 5 lines: a command, then output lines), with a blinking block cursor that advances. Completed lines stay; text never overflows the terminal box; the terminal stays centered and fully on screen.
requirements: A centered terminal window with a title bar and three colored dots is fully within the viewport at every frame
Text is revealed progressively over time (more characters/lines visible in later frames)
At least 5 lines are present by the final frame
A blinking block cursor is visible and advances with the text
Text never overflows the terminal box (no clipping at the box edge, no horizontal overflow of a line)
Completed lines remain visible (text is not erased between frames except the cursor blink)
The terminal window does not move off-screen or get clipped at any frame
No page scrollbar at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG, NO <canvas>) of an analog clock. A centered SVG clock face with 12 hour ticks (evenly spaced around the dial), numerals, and three hands (hour, minute, second) of distinct lengths. Over ~6s the second hand sweeps smoothly (one full or partial revolution), the minute hand moves slightly; all hands rotate about the exact center and stay within the dial radius.
requirements: A centered circular clock face with 12 evenly-spaced hour ticks is fully within the viewport at every frame
Three hands of distinct lengths (hour, minute, second) all pivot about the exact center of the dial
The second hand's angle changes between consecutive frames (it is sweeping)
No hand extends beyond the dial's outer radius at any frame
The 12 numerals stay in their positions around the dial and do not overlap
The clock face stays centered and is never clipped at a viewport edge
Hour ticks are evenly spaced (uniform angular spacing)
No scrollbar at any frame
expected_issues: Hands extend past the dial / off-center pivot

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG, NO <canvas>) of an org chart expanding. Start with a single root node centered at top; over ~4s reveal level 2 (3 children) then level 3 (each child gains 2 leaves, 6 leaves), with connector lines drawn from parent to child as nodes appear. Nodes on the same level are equal-size, equally spaced, and share a horizontal row; connectors join box edges without crossing through other node labels.
requirements: Nodes on the same level are equal-size and share a horizontal row (aligned) at every frame where they exist
The chart expands over time: more levels/nodes are visible in later frames than earlier ones
By the final frame there are 1 + 3 + 6 = 10 nodes in three aligned levels
Connector lines join parent and child node edges and do not pass through any other node's label
All nodes and connectors stay fully within the viewport at every frame
Sibling nodes on each level are equally spaced (uniform gaps)
Node labels stay inside their boxes and do not overlap
No scrollbar at any frame
expected_issues: Lower levels overflow the viewport width

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG, NO <canvas>) of an audio equalizer: a row of 16 equal-width vertical bars on a shared baseline, each oscillating up and down at its own rate over ~4s (a lively equalizer look). Bars keep equal width, the shared baseline, and uniform gaps; none exceeds the top of its track or the viewport.
requirements: Exactly 16 equal-width bars share one baseline with uniform gaps at every frame
Bar heights change over time (the equalizer is animating, not static)
No bar exceeds the top of its track or extends beyond the viewport at any frame
All 16 bars stay within the viewport horizontally (none clipped at the side)
Bars never overlap horizontally (gaps preserved as heights change)
The baseline stays fixed (bars grow/shrink from the same bottom line)
Different bars show different heights within a frame (independent oscillation)
No scrollbar at any frame
expected_issues: Bars exceed track top / go off-canvas
Bars change width or baseline shifts

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG/JS, NO <canvas>) of a horizontal media timeline. A full-width track with evenly-spaced tick marks and time labels (0:00 .. 5:00), a playhead that moves left-to-right over ~5s, and 4 event markers at fixed positions that 'pop' (scale up briefly) as the playhead passes them. The track, ticks, playhead and markers stay on one aligned horizontal axis, fully on screen.
requirements: A horizontal track with evenly-spaced tick marks and time labels spans the width, fully within the viewport
The playhead moves left-to-right over time (its x-position increases across frames)
Exactly 4 event markers sit at fixed positions on the track axis
Each marker pops (scales up) around the time the playhead passes it
The playhead never leaves the track / viewport bounds
Tick marks are evenly spaced and aligned on the track axis
Time labels stay attached under their ticks and do not overlap
No scrollbar at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG, NO <canvas>) of a donut chart assembling. A centered SVG donut with 4 segments (40%, 30%, 20%, 10%) that draw in sequence over ~3.5s (each arc sweeps from 0 to its share), with a center label counting up to 100% and a legend of 4 aligned rows (color swatch + label + percent) appearing alongside. Donut stays centered; legend rows stay aligned.
requirements: A centered donut chart is fully within the viewport at every frame
The four segments draw in over time (more arc is filled in later frames)
By the final frame the four segments total a full ring in proportions 40/30/20/10
A center label counts up and ends at 100%
A legend of exactly 4 rows (swatch + label + percent) is left-aligned in a column with uniform row spacing
Legend swatch colors match the corresponding donut segments
Donut and legend do not overlap and both stay within the viewport
No scrollbar at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/JS, NO <canvas>) of a task card moving across a Kanban board. Three equal-width columns (To Do, Doing, Done) with headers, each holding 2-3 static cards, plus one highlighted card that animates over ~4s from the To Do column to Doing to Done (sliding between columns and settling at the bottom of each). Columns stay equal-width and aligned; the moving card never leaves the board or overlaps a column header.
requirements: Three equal-width columns sharing the same top edge with uniform gutters at every frame
Each column has a header label (To Do, Doing, Done) and static cards
The highlighted card changes column over time (To Do -> Doing -> Done)
The moving card stays fully within the board and viewport at every frame
The moving card does not overlap any column header or any other card's text
Cards within a column are equal width and left/right aligned to their column
By the final frame the highlighted card is in the Done column
No scrollbar at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG/JS, NO <canvas>) of a small network graph settling. Six labeled circular nodes connected by edges start clustered near the center and, over ~4s, animate outward to a spread, readable layout (a hexagon-like arrangement); edges follow their endpoints. Final layout has no node overlapping another and no edge passing through a non-endpoint node. All nodes stay within the viewport throughout.
requirements: Exactly 6 labeled circular nodes are present at every frame
Nodes move apart over time (the layout spreads from clustered to dispersed)
All nodes stay fully within the viewport at every frame (none clipped at an edge)
In the final frame no node overlaps another node
Edges connect to node centers/edges and follow the nodes as they move
In the final frame no edge passes through a node that is not its endpoint
Node labels stay attached and legible (not overlapping other nodes)
No scrollbar at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/JS, NO <canvas>) of a staggered grid reveal. A 3x3 grid of 9 equal-size cards fades-and-slides in one-by-one (staggered over ~3s, e.g. top-left first to bottom-right last), each settling into its aligned grid cell. The final grid is perfectly aligned (equal-size cells, uniform gutters). Cards slide in from a small offset, never from off-screen far enough to be clipped at a viewport edge.
requirements: The final frame shows a 3x3 grid of 9 equal-size cards with uniform row and column gutters, aligned
Cards appear in a staggered sequence over time (more cards visible in later frames)
All cards (including mid-slide) stay fully within the viewport at every frame
In the final frame all 9 cards are present and aligned to the grid
Cards do not overlap each other at any frame
The three columns share vertical edges and the three rows share horizontal edges (clean grid)
Each card's content stays inside the card (no overflow)
No scrollbar at any frame
expected_issues: Cards slide in from off-canvas and get clipped

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS, NO <canvas>) of a centered multi-stage loading sequence. A centered card shows a row of 3 equal, equally-spaced pulsing dots, below a determinate progress bar that fills 0->100% over ~3s, below a status text that changes through 'Connecting...' -> 'Downloading...' -> 'Done'. Everything stays centered and within the card; the card stays centered on screen.
requirements: A centered card containing the dots, progress bar, and status text is fully within the viewport at every frame
Exactly 3 equal-size dots in one aligned, equally-spaced row, pulsing (their scale/opacity changes over time)
A progress bar fills monotonically from 0% toward 100% over time and ends full
The status text changes through the three stages over time
The progress fill never exceeds the bar track bounds
All elements stay inside the card and the card stays centered (no drift off-screen)
The dots row, bar, and text are horizontally centered and vertically stacked with consistent spacing
No scrollbar at any frame

description: Create a self-contained 1920x1080 HTML animation (inline CSS/SVG/JS, NO <canvas>) of a route drawing on a stylized map. A centered SVG map panel contains 4 location pins; over ~4s the pins drop in sequence (a small bounce) and a route polyline draws progressively connecting them in order, with a moving marker traveling along the drawn route. All pins, the route, and the marker stay within the map panel and the viewport.
requirements: A centered map panel is fully within the viewport at every frame
Exactly 4 pins drop in sequence over time (more pins present in later frames)
A route polyline draws progressively over time, connecting the pins in order
A marker travels along the drawn portion of the route (its position advances over frames)
All pins, the route, and the marker stay within the map panel bounds at every frame
Pins do not overlap each other
By the final frame all 4 pins and the full route are visible
No scrollbar at any frame
expected_issues: Route or marker leaves the map panel
